description: Common Alerting Protocol (CAP) source catalog for the cap-alerts feeder. Each entry is a pollable CAP XML, Atom/CAP, or provider CAP-equivalent JSON endpoint. Choose which entries run with CAP_SELECT: a comma-separated list of names, or '*' for all; when unset, every entry whose 'enabled' flag is true is polled. Point CAP_SOURCES_FILE at a copy of this file to maintain your own catalog. The legacy CAP_SOURCES inline JSON configuration still works and takes precedence when set. Secrets may be written as ${ENV_VAR} and are expanded from the environment at load time, so keys never live in this file.

sources.name: nws-us-active-alerts
sources.description: US National Weather Service active-alerts CAP-equivalent JSON feed, with NWS zone metadata refreshed as reference data.

sources.name: meteoalarm-belgium
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Belgium legacy Atom feed whose entries link to CAP alert XML documents.

sources.name: meteoalarm-ireland
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Ireland legacy Atom feed aggregating Met Eireann official weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-ireland' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-france
sources.description: MeteoAlarm France legacy Atom feed aggregating Meteo-France Vigilance weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-france' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-spain
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Spain legacy Atom feed aggregating AEMET official weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-spain' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-germany
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Germany legacy Atom feed aggregating Deutscher Wetterdienst (DWD) weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-germany' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-austria
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Austria legacy Atom feed aggregating GeoSphere Austria (ZAMG) weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-austria' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-italy
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Italy legacy Atom feed aggregating Italian national weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-italy' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-netherlands
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Netherlands legacy Atom feed aggregating KNMI weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-netherlands' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-portugal
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Portugal legacy Atom feed aggregating IPMA weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-portugal' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-switzerland
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Switzerland legacy Atom feed aggregating MeteoSwiss weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-switzerland' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: meteoalarm-poland
sources.description: MeteoAlarm Poland legacy Atom feed aggregating IMGW weather warnings; entries link to CAP alert XML. Add 'meteoalarm-poland' to CAP_SELECT to enable.

sources.name: national-cap-feed-template
sources.description: TEMPLATE - copy this entry for another national CAP feed, replace url with the agency's CAP endpoint, set cap_source_id to a stable short identifier, add auth_header or auth_env if the feed is key-protected, and set enabled to true.
